description: karnataka.gov.in is the web domain for government services and department websites of the State of Karnataka, India. Its subdomains host public service portals and application systems for different departments and programs.
summary: Found one documented HTTP API surface on a karnataka.gov.in subdomain (Sujala 3 LRI mobile service API); other discovered API/help pages on karnataka.gov.in subdomains were not retrievable enough to confirm surface details or authentication, and no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
